campaign: MarbMarket — The First veDEX on MegaETH is Launching
mission: Explain the veDEX Model & Why MarbMarket Matters
best_content:
MarbMarket is bringing the veDEX model to MegaETH — the first of its kind on this emerging L2! 🚀

A veDEX (Vote-Escrowed DEX) rewards users for locking MARB tokens, giving them voting power over where liquidity rewards flow. Longer locks = more influence + more rewards.

MarbMarket's fair launch means no presale, no VC backing — just pure community power from day one. 

The MARB flywheel is brilliant: lockers direct emissions → LPs get rewards → protocols pay bribes for votes → incentives flow back to lockers. 

Learn more: x.com/Marb_market

Which veDEX feature excites you most? Vote-escrow, bribes, or LP farming? @RallyOnChain
qa_comments: The flywheel mechanics look brilliant - love how incentives flow back to lockers!
Bribes for votes really aligns incentives perfectly between protocols and users.
LP farming on a community-powered DEX sounds like the sweet spot for passive income.
